title: The Dummy Systems Backwards Message MESSAGE FOUND
display_title: The Dummy Systems Backwards Message MESSAGE FOUND
wikitext:
[]: The Dummy System's Backwards Message: MESSAGE FOUND!             Quote Post by NAveryW » Wed Jun 02, 2010 1:19 am When the Dummy System lowers onto Shinji, it kind of sounds like an electronic voice, doesn't it? As ZapX put it, like a Cylon. It also, in my opinion, sounds like it was recorded backwards. I've worked a lot with reversing sound and it sounds to me very much like it was reversed after being recorded. So I recorded it, reversed it, and played it back. There's no doubt: it's a vocoded message, and while I'm not sure, it seems to be in English. It contains non-Japanese syllables and the person talking seems to have an accent that could be considered American. I couldn't make out what was being said, but Reichu heard "dominated by others". I searched that and found it. It's a quote from the cult classic sci-fi film Colossus: The Forbin Project . It's saying: "Freedom is an illusion. All you lose is the emotion of pride. To be dominated by me is not as bad for human pride as to be dominated by others of your species." Coincidentally, I saw the film last year, which makes this discovery all the more powerful. The context is (spoilers for Colossus: The Forbin Project ): SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Wed Jun 02, 2010 1:30 am poast audio megaupload naow you worthless piece of crap!

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Wed Jun 02, 2010 1:35 am Whoops, I'd had a link to the MP3 hosted on my own site (WAAY better than Megaupload because you don't have to wait 45 seconds) but my edit removed the link when I replaced that chunk of text after figuring out the message. Here you go.

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Wed Jun 02, 2010 1:43 am coooooool

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Jun 02, 2010 2:07 am Glad I could help. I did a Japanese Google search to see if any of our overseas counterparts had found this yet, but apparently not .

[]:             Quote Post by bladerj » Wed Jun 02, 2010 2:10 am Shiiiiiiiiiiiiiiiiiiiiiiiiiiiiiiiiieeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeet !! Congrats on that one detective ! Seems ritsuku has a dark sense of humour after all, lol.

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Wed Jun 02, 2010 2:10 am Reichu wrote: Glad I could help. I did a Japanese Google search to see if any of our overseas counterparts had found this yet, but apparently not .

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Wed Jun 02, 2010 2:13 am slothen wrote: So what now, someone post it on 2ch?

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Wed Jun 02, 2010 2:15 am make an image with instructions on how to reproduce this, and stamp your name all over it. Post everywhere.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Wed Jun 02, 2010 2:19 am I saw the movie as a Netflix rental, so unfortunately I no longer have the DVD with me to determine whether the audio was taken directly from the film. Fortunately, YouTube has the video up in ten parts and memory served correctly about the line being in the last part of the film. Unlike NGE's images from The Andromeda Strain , the audio is not taken directly from Colossus ; it was recorded and processed anew for Evangelion .

[]:             Quote Post by Fazmotron » Wed Jun 02, 2010 3:08 am That is ridiculously cool. Top notch NAW.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Wed Jun 02, 2010 4:38 am Very nice find. Also, not a bad flick... sort of the opposite of "War Games".

[]:             Quote Post by Zetrien » Wed Jun 02, 2010 4:58 am Most interesting... I hadn't paid too much attention to the sound. Guess I'll have to watch it again, after listening to this file. Not that I mind. On a partly related note, I had a thought while watching it the first time. The children's song that plays when the Dummy Plug was activated... "What if the Dummy Plug is singing?"

[]: Re: The Dummy System's Backwards Message: MESSAGE FOUND!             Quote Post by IkariRei » Wed Jun 02, 2010 6:26 am NAveryW wrote: snip

[]:             Quote Post by Delular » Wed Jun 02, 2010 6:53 am Makes sense, Collossus was a giant. Giants, in a biblical old testament sense, could be regarded as 'nephilim'. Nephilim were the offspring of angels and mortals, one being Goliath (as per the base in the movie). Nice catch btw.

[]:             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Wed Jun 02, 2010 7:12 am Easily the best find yet. Awesome! ^ That, and the lines fit the actual happenings perfectly.

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Wed Jun 02, 2010 10:26 am Anno really digs those old sci-fi movies. Awesome find, NAW!

[]:             Quote Post by Seele00TextOnly » Wed Jun 02, 2010 10:51 am ...

[]:             Quote Post by IkariRei » Wed Jun 02, 2010 11:57 am Isn't the fact that the Dummy Plug stomped over Shinj's will enough?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Jun 02, 2010 12:09 pm Seele 00 Text Only wrote: The Rei clone at the heart of the dummy plug almost certainly didn't know English.
